specification:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
 <CHTBillingRules createdBy="CloudHealth"  date="11/07/18">
  <Comment>The RuleGroups below add is the list price rate on Cloudfront HTTP/s data for specific regions (https://aws.amazon.com/cloudfront/pricing/). The start date is January 2015 to current. This is to accommodate the special pricing that Root360 receives from AWS. Rule after is a fixed rate of $.04 on CloudFront data out in US/CA/EU regions and $.10 CloudFront Data Out in AP/SA/IN/JP/AU regions.</Comment>
  <RuleGroup>
      <BillingRule name="List Price of CloudFront HTTPS usage in US/CA region" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.0000010000" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="US-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
            <UsageType name="CA-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
        <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="List Price of CloudFront HTTP usage in US/CA region" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.0000007500" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="US-Requests-Tier1"/>
            <UsageType name="CA-Requests-Tier1"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="List Price of CloudFront HTTPS usage in Europe, Middle East, Japan, India, South Africa, and Singapore, South Korea, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Philippines regions" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.0000012000" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="EU-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
            <UsageType name="ME-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
            <UsageType name="JP-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
            <UsageType name="IN-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
            <UsageType name="ZA-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
            <UsageType name="AP-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
        <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="List Price of CloudFront HTTP usage in Europe, Middle East, Japan, India, South Africa, and Singapore, South Korea, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Philippines regions" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.0000009000" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="EU-Requests-Tier1"/>
            <UsageType name="ME-Requests-Tier1"/>
            <UsageType name="JP-Requests-Tier1"/>
            <UsageType name="IN-Requests-Tier1"/>
            <UsageType name="ZA-Requests-Tier1"/>
            <UsageType name="AP-Requests-Tier1"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="List Price of CloudFront HTTPS usage in Australia region" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.0000012500" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="AU-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
        <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="List Price of CloudFront HTTP usage in Austrailia region" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.0000009000" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="AU-Requests-Tier1"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="List Price of CloudFront HTTPS usage in South America region" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.0000022000" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="SA-Requests-Tier2-HTTPS"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="List Price of CloudFront HTTP usage in South America region" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.00000160000" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="SA-Requests-Tier1"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="$.085 Fixed Rate for CloudFront data out in US/CA/EU regions" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.085" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="US-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
            <UsageType name="CA-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
            <UsageType name="EU-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="$.11 Fixed Rate for CloudFront data out in ZE/ME regions" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.11" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="ZE-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
            <UsageType name="ME-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="$.114 Fixed Rate for CloudFront data out in JP/AU regions" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.114" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="JP-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
            <UsageType name="AU-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="$.14 Fixed Rate for CloudFront data out in AP regions" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.14" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="AP-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="$.17 Fixed Rate for CloudFront data out in IN regions" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.17" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="IN-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
    <RuleGroup startDate="2018-12-01">
      <BillingRule name="$.25 Fixed Rate for CloudFront data out in SA regions" includeDataTransfer="true">
        <BasicBillingRule billingAdjustment="0.25" billingRuleType="fixedRate"/>
          <Product productName="CloudFront">
            <UsageType name="SA-DataTransfer-Out-Bytes"/>
          </Product>
      </BillingRule>
    </RuleGroup>
</CHTBillingRules>
